name: create_material
description: Create a new Material asset with a specified shader. The material is saved to the given asset path. Use set_material_property afterwards to assign textures, colors, and other shader properties. NAMING CONVENTION: Material filenames MUST use the M_ prefix in PascalCase (e.g. M_BrickWall.mat, M_Character_Skin.mat, M_TreasureChest.mat). Never use lowercase or omit the M_ prefix.

asset_path.description: Path where the material will be saved. Must end with '.mat' and use M_ prefix naming (e.g. 'Assets/Materials/M_TreasureChest.mat'). Parent directories are created automatically.

shader.description: Full shader name. Default: 'Universal Render Pipeline/Lit'. Other common options: 'Universal Render Pipeline/Unlit', 'Universal Render Pipeline/Simple Lit'.
